official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound teleport_entity body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns teleport_entity to packet id 0x7d.
The generated fixture uses the official primitive teleport factory with entity id 12345, a PositionMoveRotation value, empty relatives, and onGround=false.
The official body is entity id VarInt, position Vec3, delta Vec3, yRot float, xRot float, relative bitset int, and onGround boolean.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded primitive fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, movement semantics, relative movement policy, world state, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, movement semantics, relative movement policy, world state, or client-load behavior.
